command: N/A — limitation packet, no live probe required
acceptance_criteria: Sort/filter-safe targeting proof on the live Orders document surface.

assertions.label: Sort is disabled on all Orders document grid columns
assertions.expected: Every column definition in OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid sets sortable: false.
assertions.observed: Confirmed: sortable: false on all columns (productDisplayName, batchSku, quantity, cogsPerUnit, marginPercent, unitPrice, lineTotal, isSample)

assertions.label: Filter is disabled on all Orders document grid columns
assertions.expected: Every column definition in OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid sets filter: false.
assertions.observed: Confirmed: filter: false on all columns

assertions.label: focusedRowId targeting is implemented and unit-tested
assertions.expected: SpreadsheetPilotGrid records focusedRowId and OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid resolves focused-row actions by stable row id.
assertions.observed: Unit tests in OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (line 238) and SpreadsheetPilotGrid.test.tsx confirm focusedRowId-based targeting

assertions.label: Fill writeback preserves hidden rows and original logical order
assertions.expected: Fill end handler iterates normalizedItems by rowId instead of trusting displayed row position.
assertions.observed: Unit test at OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (line 380) confirms hidden rows survive fill writeback

limitation_detail.constraint: The Orders document grid deliberately disables sort and filter on every column. This is a deliberate surface-design decision, not a code gap.
limitation_detail.code_readiness: The focusedRowId targeting fix, fill-writeback hidden-row preservation, and stable-row-id resolution are all implemented and unit-tested. The code is ready for sort/filter if the surface ever enables it.
limitation_detail.boundary_contract: Per PowersheetGrid-boundary-contract.md (ORD-SS-012 section): no other module may claim ORD-SS-012 coverage from Orders while SALE-ORD-031 remains an Orders-surface limitation. If another module enables sort/filter, it needs its own explicit live-proof lane.
limitation_detail.unblock_condition: A future Orders surface change that enables sort or filter on at least one column, followed by a live proof that row targeting remains stable after sort/filter changes display order.
